title: TextWidgetConfig
description: Config for sandbox.text — a single atlas-text block.

x-atlas-presets.label: Body paragraph
x-atlas-presets.description: Standard reading text in a block-level paragraph.

x-atlas-presets.label: Error callout
x-atlas-presets.description: Red error-toned text suitable for inline warnings.

content.title: Content
content.description: The text to display. Plain text only — markup is escaped.

variant.title: Variant
variant.description: Visual variant. body is the default reading style.

block.title: Block-level
block.description: Render as a block-level element (own line). Off renders inline.
